# Secrets Verification

Since I cannot access repository secrets directly, please verify that the following secrets are set:

## `DaRipper91/repo-map`
- [ ] **GH_TOKEN**: A GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) with `repo`, `workflow`, and `read:org` scopes.

## All Other Repositories
- [ ] **GEMINI_API_KEY**: API key from [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey).
- [ ] **CHANGELOG_TOKEN** (Optional): A GitHub PAT with `repo` scope. If not provided, the workflow defaults to `GITHUB_TOKEN`.
